untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'multiple consecutive bars meeting criteria' and comparison of bar range to SMA of bar range (not available). Volume multiplier 4-5x cannot be precisely calibrated without knowing vol_ratio_20 calculation baseline. Price distance from MA in standard deviations requires volatility-adjusted threshold not directly expressible.
translation_notes: Approximated climactic conditions using: (1) expanded bar range via range > atr_14, (2) volume spike via vol_ratio_20 as proxy for 4-5x average, (3) close at extreme via close >= high (buying climax) or close <= low (selling climax). Exit on volume normalization. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserves the reversal nature (long on selling climax, short on buying climax). Actual implementation should validate vol_ratio_20 meets 4-5x threshold and use multi-bar confirmation logic.
